---
title: "Figure-collect Example"
format: 
   docx
filters:
  - at: post-quarto
    path: figure-collect
figure-collect:
  figure-dir: figures_copy
  figure-caption-section: figure-caption-section
  copy-figures: true
  keep-figures: false
  figure-kinds: [fig, suppfig]
  clean-figure-dir: true
crossref:
  custom:
    - kind: float
      key: suppfig
      latex-env: suppfig
      reference-prefix: Figure S
      space-before-numbering: false
      latex-list-of-description: Supplementary Figure
---

## Heading

This filter adds formatting to heading text. And here we reference @fig-fig1.

::: {#fig-fig1}

![](example_figs/elephant.png)

This is an elephant.

:::


## Heading 2

Here we reference @fig-fig2. 

::: {#fig-fig2}

![](example_figs/reimg_millet.png)

Millet was a painter and now AI paints faster. And here we reference @fig-fig1.

:::

## Supplementary

Here we have a supplementary figure @suppfig-fig1.

::: {#suppfig-fig1}

![](example_figs/supp1.jpg)

Millet was a painter and now AI paints faster.

:::

## This is where we move the main captions

::: {.figure-caption-section}

:::

## This is where we move the supplementary captions

::: {.figure-caption-section-suppfig}

:::
